end,function(A)v[A]=v[A]-(219943+-219942)if-409578-(-409578)==v[A]then v[A],W[A]=nil,nil end end,function(A,F)local H=g(F)local V=function(V,X,s,d,D,W,v,C,z)return i(A,{V,X;s,d;D;W,v;C,z},F,H)end end,function(A,F)local H=g(F)local V=function(V,X,s,d)return i(A,{V,X;s,d},F,H)end return V end,function(A,F)local H=g(F)local V=function(V)return i(A,{V},F,H)end return V end,function(A,F)local
